title: LumbarSR: A Paired Clinical CT and Photon-Counting Micro-CT Dataset for Human Lumbar Vertebrae
authors_text: Ping Wang*, Ruipeng Zhang*, Mengfei Wang, Shenyan Zong, Jinyu Zhu, Xinyu Song, Zhenzhen Cao, Xuefei Hu, Dan Wang, Yuehua Li.
abstract: LumbarSR provides the first paired clinical CT and photon-counting micro-CT dataset of human lumbar vertebrae, enabling super-resolution benchmarks that bridge the resolution gap between in-vivo imaging and high-resolution ex-vivo micro-CT. The dataset and challenge foster reproducible evaluation of medical image super-resolution methods.
